author: ABC News YouTube
text:
Another home collapses into ocean in North Carolina town
An oceanfront home collapsed into the Atlantic Ocean in Buxton, North Carolina, on Tuesday. It's the 20th house in the area to collapse into the sea since September 2025.

author: ABC News YouTube
text:
A woman is suing Outback Steakhouse for $1.5 million
A woman is suing Outback Steakhouse for $1.5 million, alleging she was injured after slipping on mashed potatoes at a restaurant in Virginia in 2023.

author: ABC News YouTube
text:
Texas Tech eyes another national softball title at Women’s College World Series
Texas leads the Women’s College World Series finals after a 7-3 Game 1 win over Texas Tech. ESPN’s Jessica Mendoza breaks down Game 2, key players, and NIL’s impact.

author: ABC News YouTube
text:
Jan. 6 riot compensation push sparks new legal and political clash
ABC News' Peter Charalambous reports on attorneys seeking damages for Jan. 6 defendants. Former Capitol Police Officer Harry Dunn, who is suing to block payments, joins to respond.

author: ABC News YouTube
text:
Russell Wilson retires, Meghan Markle celebrates Lilibet's birthday and more
Rocsi Diaz breaks down trending pop culture stories, including NFL quarterback Russell Wilson's retirement and move to broadcasting, and Meghan Markle's birthday tribute to Princess Lilibet.

text:
Looking ahead to Knicks vs. Spurs Game 2 & more trends | Searched
ABC News Live is breaking down the top stories trending today:
NBA Finals: Predictions for Spurs and Knicks after Jalen Brunson and Wemby's performance. 
Senate holds "vote-a-rama" on ICE funding. 
John Bolton reaches plea deal over mishandling of classified information. 
Georgia officials urge residents to kill invasive Argentine tegus lizard. 
Outback Steakhouse sued for $1.5 million over alleged mashed potato slip-and-fall. 
 
Watch ‘Searched’ weeknights at 4:30 p.m. ET on @ABCNewsLive.

author: ABC News YouTube
text:
Sherpa found alive after going missing for six days on Mount Everest
In what authorities are calling an "astonishing" testament of human survival, a Mount Everest sherpa was found alive on Thursday after he went missing six days ago on the world's tallest mountain.

author: ABC News YouTube
text:
USDA confirms detection of New World screwworm in Texas
A parasitic fly known as the screwworm has been found in the U.S. for the first time in decades, posing a risk to the nation's cattle.

author: ABC News YouTube
text:
Possibility of World Cup Soccer without spirits
A week before the first World Cup Match, about 2,000 bartenders, cooks and other hospitality workers at So-Fi stadium in Los Angeles are set to vote on whether to authorize a strike.

author: ABC News YouTube
text:
Northern Lights could be visible across 23 U.S. states
The National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration's prediction center has issued a strong geomagnetic storm watch for Thursday and Friday across 23 states. It's possible the Northern Lights could be seen further south than usual in some areas.

author: ABC News YouTube
text:
John Bolton expected to plead guilty over mishandling classified information: Sources
President Trump's former national security adviser John Bolton is expected to plead guilty over mishandling classified information, sources familiar with the matter told ABC News Thursday.
 
ABC News’ Olivia Rubin reports.
